question: Create three tensors using different PyTorch tensor creation functions: 1) a 2x3 tensor of random normal numbers using torch.randn with seed 42, 2) a 2x3 tensor of zeros using torch.zeros, and 3) a 2x3 tensor of ones using torch.ones. Print all three tensors.
code_hint: Use torch.manual_seed(42) before torch.randn(), torch.zeros((rows, cols)) for zeros, and torch.ones((rows, cols)) for ones
